recommendations.title: Bus Stop

recommendations.title: Sayonara
recommendations.overview: Air Force Major Lloyd Gruver is reassigned to a Japanese air base and is confronted with US racial prejudice against the Japanese people. The issue is compounded because a number of the soldiers become romantically involved with Japanese women, in de

recommendations.title: Paint Your Wagon
recommendations.overview: A Michigan farmer and a prospector form a partnership in the California gold country. Their adventures include buying and sharing a wife, hijacking a stage, kidnapping six prostitutes, and turning their mining camp into a boom town. Along the way the

recommendations.title: South Pacific
recommendations.overview: Can a girl from Little Rock find happiness with a mature French planter she got to know one enchanted evening away from the military hospital where she is a nurse? Or should she just wash that man out of her hair? Bloody Mary is the philosopher of th

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth 2
recommendations.overview: With college decisions looming, Elle juggles her long-distance romance with Noah, changing relationship with bestie Lee and feelings for a new classmate.

recommendations.title: Dogville
recommendations.overview: A woman on the run from the mob is reluctantly accepted in a small Colorado community in exchange for labor, but when a search visits the town, she learns that their support has a price.

recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: A married woman and a drifter fall in love, then plot to murder her husband.

recommendations.title: Daydream Nation
recommendations.overview: Forced to move to a boring backwater town, a teenager embarks on affairs with a teacher and a stoner classmate.

recommendations.title: Splendor in the Grass
recommendations.overview: A fragile Kansas girl's unrequited and forbidden love for a handsome young man from the town's most powerful family drives her to heartbreak and madness.

recommendations.title: Irrational Man
recommendations.overview: On a small town college campus, a philosophy professor in existential crisis gives his life new purpose when he enters into a relationship with his student.
